Interview Text:
Bill: 

(part 3)

For me, it's not about the money. I'd say 99% of the people who miss the kingdom of God miss it because of money. We think money drives the solutions for what we think we need to do. In ethiopia they don't turn to money to solve their problem, they automatically turn to God. 

When my grandkids ask to be entertained. I used money to pay for a netflix movie, when God really wanted me to take a break.

Ross, "Always make sure money is not the motivation for your books."
Music Video Instructions: If you're feeling doubts, talk about them with God.
